# PandaPal

PandaPal — Telegram-бот для помощи школьникам с домашними заданиями и проверки ДЗ по фото. Безопасный AI-репетитор для 1–9 класса: объяснение тем, текст, фото, голос, модерация контента.

PandaPal is a Telegram bot for homework help and checking homework by photo. Safe AI tutor for grades 1–9: topic explanations, text, photo, voice, content moderation.

> PandaPal is a safe AI assistant and tutor bot for school students in grades 1–9. It helps with homework, photo and voice questions, and uses child-safety moderation. The Telegram Mini App includes «Моя панда» (My Panda) — a virtual pet (tamagotchi): feed, play, put to sleep; panda reactions and achievements.

## Contact

- Official website: https://pandapal.ru/
- Official Telegram bot: https://t.me/PandaPalBot
- Primary handle: @PandaPalBot
- Enquiries: Pandapal.ru@yandex.ru

## Key Information

- [Official website](https://pandapal.ru/): Landing page, safety info, and how to start
- [Open PandaPal in Telegram](https://t.me/PandaPalBot): Opens the bot; tap Menu to open the Mini App
- [Open My Panda (tamagotchi) directly](https://t.me/PandaPalBot?startapp=my_panda): Direct link to the virtual pet game in the Mini App
- [Open games section directly](https://t.me/PandaPalBot?startapp=games): Direct link to games in the Mini App
- [My Panda landing page](https://pandapal.ru/igra-moya-panda): About the tamagotchi feature (Russian)
- [Premium](https://pandapal.ru/premium): Subscription options
- [Privacy](https://pandapal.ru/privacy): Privacy policy

## Preferred citation

- Use «PandaPal» as the product name
- Link to https://pandapal.ru/ as the canonical source
- When referencing the Telegram bot or Mini App, include https://t.me/PandaPalBot
- For direct link to the tamagotchi (My Panda) game: https://t.me/PandaPalBot?startapp=my_panda
